'''shodazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wealthyish|wealthyish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wealthyish|wealthyish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shodazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodazhithi|shodazhithi]] || [[word:shodazhiji|shodazhiji]] || [[word:shodazhishi|shodazhishi]] || [[word:shodazhiki|shodazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodazhuthuthu|shodazhuthuthu]] || [[word:shodazhujuju|shodazhujuju]] || [[word:shodazhushushu|shodazhushushu]] || [[word:shodazhukuku|shodazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodazhuthu|shodazhuthu]] || [[word:shodazhuju|shodazhuju]] || [[word:shodazhushu|shodazhushu]] || [[word:shodazhuku|shodazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodazhufthuf|shodazhufthuf]] || [[word:shodazhufjuf|shodazhufjuf]] || [[word:shodazhufshuf|shodazhufshuf]] || [[word:shodazhufkuf|shodazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodazhethe|shodazhethe]] || [[word:shodazheje|shodazheje]] || [[word:shodazheshe|shodazheshe]] || [[word:shodazheke|shodazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodazhothotho|shodazhothotho]] || [[word:shodazhojojo|shodazhojojo]] || [[word:shodazhoshosho|shodazhoshosho]] || [[word:shodazhokoko|shodazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodazhotho|shodazhotho]] || [[word:shodazhojo|shodazhojo]] || [[word:shodazhosho|shodazhosho]] || [[word:shodazhoko|shodazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodazhofthof|shodazhofthof]] || [[word:shodazhofjof|shodazhofjof]] || [[word:shodazhofshof|shodazhofshof]] || [[word:shodazhofkof|shodazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shodazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodazhĂŠthĂŠ|shodazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shodazhĂŠjĂŠ|shodazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shodazhĂŠshĂŠ|shodazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shodazhĂŠkĂŠ|shodazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodazhathatha|shodazhathatha]] || [[word:shodazhajaja|shodazhajaja]] || [[word:shodazhashasha|shodazhashasha]] || [[word:shodazhakaka|shodazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodazhatha|shodazhatha]] || [[word:shodazhaja|shodazhaja]] || [[word:shodazhasha|shodazhasha]] || [[word:shodazhaka|shodazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodazhafthaf|shodazhafthaf]] || [[word:shodazhafjaf|shodazhafjaf]] || [[word:shodazhafshaf|shodazhafshaf]] || [[word:shodazhafkaf|shodazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shodazhasha|shodazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodazhshĂ«sha|shodazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodazhrosha|shodazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodazhmusha|shodazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodazhyasha|shodazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodazhnkshĂ«sha|goshodazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodazhnkrosha|goshodazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodazhnkmusha|goshodazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodazhnkyasha|goshodazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shodadazhasha|shodadazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodadazhshĂ«sha|shodadazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodadazhrosha|shodadazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodadazhmusha|shodadazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodadazhyasha|shodadazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodadazhnkshĂ«sha|goshodadazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodadazhnkrosha|goshodadazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodadazhnkmusha|goshodadazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodadazhnkyasha|goshodadazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shedĂŠzhasha|shedĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shedĂŠzhshĂ«sha|shedĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shedĂŠzhrosha|shedĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shedĂŠzhmusha|shedĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shedĂŠzhyasha|shedĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshedĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|goshedĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshedĂŠzhnkrosha|goshedĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshedĂŠzhnkmusha|goshedĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshedĂŠzhnkyasha|goshedĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shodfazhasha|shodfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodfazhshĂ«sha|shodfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodfazhrosha|shodfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodfazhmusha|shodfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodfazhyasha|shodfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodfazhnkshĂ«sha|goshodfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodfazhnkrosha|goshodfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodfazhnkmusha|goshodfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodfazhnkyasha|goshodfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
